data.settleTest: A channel share study or set of CE distributor/operator interviews quantifying what fraction of PDU spend actually flows through OEM/integrator white-label channels contestable by a regional manufacturer — this is a knowable fact about today's channel structure, not a future event.

proposedCorrection.rationale: If the OEM/integrator channel is structurally locked to low-cost Asian ODMs on unit cost, most of the 22% is not serviceable for a Central European entrant, so the addressable slice should be marked down to a small cost-insensitive/feature-driven residual.

researchQueries.query: Share of European data center PDU OEM/integrator channel supplied by Taiwanese/Chinese ODMs (Digipower, GETEKnet) vs regional/branded vendors (Panduit, Schneider, Rittal) 2024-2025
Integrator PDU procurement awarded on features/certification/local support rather than unit cost in Central Europe — case studies of branded PDU wins in rack-integration deals
